title: Start and stop a focused activity timer and log a time block to today
description: This test verifies a user can start a timer from the Weekly Log, stop it, and see a new time block added to today with updated day/weekly totals.

steps.description: Navigate to the app start view
Click the navigation item to open the Weekly Log view
Start a focused activity timer for a new activity
Wait for elapsed time to increment
Stop the active timer
Verify a new time block is displayed in today’s timeline
Verify today’s total time and the weekly total time are updated

title: Stop a timer and save the stopped session to today's log
description: This test verifies a user can stop a running timer and the completed session is saved into today’s log as a time block.

steps.description: Navigate to the app start view
Start a timer for a current task
Wait for elapsed time to increment
Stop the active timer
Click the navigation item to open the Weekly Log view
Verify the stopped session is saved and displayed in today’s timeline

title: Timer shows an active session indicator and elapsed time increments while running
description: This test verifies starting a timer displays an active-session state and the elapsed duration increases until stopped.

steps.description: Navigate to the app start view
Start a timer for a current task
Wait for elapsed time to increment
Verify an active-session indicator is displayed
Verify elapsed time is increasing while the timer runs

title: Cloud Sync can pull a newer cloud week onto a second device
description: Verifies that after updating the week on one device, opening the app on a second device updates its local week to match the newer cloud state and shows synced.

steps.description: Open the app on the first device
Make a change to weekly data via the UI
Wait for the sync status indicator to show the week is synced
Open the app on the second device
Wait for the app to finish initial loading
Verify the second device reflects the updated week from the cloud
Verify the sync status indicator shows the week is synced

title: Cloud Sync status indicates syncing then synced after a local change
description: Verifies that making a weekly data change updates the UI immediately and the sync status indicator transitions through syncing to synced.

steps.description: Open the app
Make a change to weekly data via the UI (for example, create a task, stop a timer, or update a habit)
Verify the local state reflects the change immediately
Verify the sync status indicator shows the week becomes synced after syncing

title: Manually create a time block and see it reflected in the timeline and weekly summary
description: This test verifies a user can manually create a time block in the Weekly Log and the saved entry appears in the day timeline and weekly summary totals.

steps.description: Navigate to the app start view
Click the navigation item to open the Weekly Log view
Initiate manual creation of a time block entry
Fill a short activity title into the activity field
Select a valid start time
Select a valid end time
Save the time block entry
Verify the new time block is displayed in the selected day’s timeline
Verify the weekly summary totals reflect the added time

title: Create a backlog item and move it into the current week's agenda
description: This test verifies a user can create a backlog task and move it into the Weekly Agenda where it appears in the weekly plan.

steps.description: Navigate to the app start view
Click the navigation item to open the Backlog view
Initiate creation of a new backlog item
Fill "Backlog task A" into the title field
Save the backlog item
Move "Backlog task A" into the Weekly Agenda
Click the navigation item to open the Weekly Agenda view
Verify "Backlog task A" is displayed in the current week’s plan

title: Mark today’s habit complete and see weekly progress update
description: Verifies marking a habit complete for today updates its weekly progress in the weekly view and summaries.

steps.description: Navigate to the app home screen
Click to open Habits
Start adding a new habit
Fill "Stretch" into the habit name field
Fill "3" into the weekly target field
Save the habit
Open Habits for today
Mark the habit as complete for today
Verify the habit’s weekly progress indicator increases
Verify the habit summaries reflect the updated completion count

title: Cloud Sync startup indicates a cloud check and reaches synced state
description: Verifies that on app launch the sync indicator reflects a background cloud check and then shows the week as synced.

steps.description: Open the app
Wait for the app to finish initial loading
Verify the sync status indicator reflects a sync check and then shows the week is synced

title: Create a category that can be selected when tagging items
description: Verifies a user can create a new color-coded category and it appears in the category list and is available for selection when tagging an item.

steps.description: Navigate to the app home screen
Click to open Categories management
Start creating a new category
Fill "Focus" into the category name field
Select a color for the category
Save the category
Verify the new category appears in the category list
Verify the category is selectable when choosing a category tag on an item

title: Create and save a daily journal entry
description: Verifies a user can create a daily journal entry and it appears in the day’s review and contributes to the weekly review.

steps.description: Navigate to the app home screen
Click to open Journal
Start a new daily entry for today
Fill "Today I worked on my weekly plan." into the journal text area
Save the entry
Open today’s journal review view
Verify the saved entry content is visible in today’s review
Verify the weekly review indicates an entry exists for today

title: Cloud Sync persists local-first changes across an app restart
description: Verifies that a weekly change made locally is still present after restarting the app and the sync status returns to synced afterward.

steps.description: Open the app
Make a change to weekly data via the UI
Close the app
Reopen the app
Verify the previously made change is still present in the weekly view
Verify the sync status indicator shows the week becomes synced after startup syncing completes

title: Create a habit with a weekly target
description: Verifies a user can create a custom habit with a weekly target and it appears in the habits list with the target displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to the app home screen
Click to open Habits
Start adding a new habit
Fill "Drink Water" into the habit name field
Fill "5" into the weekly target field
Save the habit
Verify the new habit appears in the habits list
Verify the habit shows a weekly target value

title: Edit an existing time block and see the updated block in the timeline
description: This test verifies a user can edit a previously created time block and the updated entry is shown in the day timeline and affects totals.

steps.description: Navigate to the app start view
Click the navigation item to open the Weekly Log view
Initiate manual creation of a time block entry
Fill a short activity title into the activity field
Select a valid start time
Select a valid end time
Save the time block entry
Open the newly created time block for editing
Update the end time to a different valid end time
Save the changes
Verify the time block shown in the day timeline reflects the updated duration
Verify the day or weekly total time is recalculated

title: Insights week selection shows charts and summaries for the chosen period
description: Verifies the user can open Insights, select a different week/date range, and see the charts and weekly summaries update to reflect that period.

steps.description: Open the app
Open Insights
Select a different week or date range for review
Verify charts for time by category, habit trends, and weekly totals are displayed for the selected period

title: Create a categorized backlog item and keep its category when moved to the weekly plan
description: This test verifies a user can assign a category to a backlog item and the category is shown when the item is moved into the Weekly Agenda.

steps.description: Navigate to the app start view
Click the navigation item to open the Backlog view
Initiate creation of a new backlog item
Fill "Backlog task with category" into the title field
Select a category for the backlog item
Save the backlog item
Move "Backlog task with category" into the Weekly Agenda
Click the navigation item to open the Weekly Agenda view
Verify the moved item is displayed in the weekly plan with its category indicated

title: Browse weekly journal review organized by day
description: Verifies weekly journal review can be opened and entries are grouped by day for quick browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to the app home screen
Click to open Journal
Start a new daily entry for today
Fill "Entry for weekly review grouping." into the journal text area
Save the entry
Open the weekly journal review
Verify the weekly review displays sections grouped by day
Verify today’s day section shows at least one entry

title: Cloud Sync shows queued state when multiple changes are made quickly
description: Verifies that making several rapid weekly changes results in the sync indicator showing a non-idle syncing/queued state and then returning to synced after completion.

steps.description: Open the app
Make a change to weekly data via the UI
Make another change to weekly data via the UI
Make a third change to weekly data via the UI
Verify the sync status indicator shows an active syncing or queued state at some point during the sequence
Verify the sync status indicator returns to synced after background syncing completes

title: Insights chart filter toggles recompute the displayed results
description: Verifies the user can toggle a chart filter/overlay and the charts update to reflect the filter selection.

steps.description: Open the app
Open Insights
Toggle a chart filter or overlay option
Verify the charts update to reflect the selected filter state

title: Insights responds to local weekly changes after returning to Insights
description: Verifies that after making a change to weekly data elsewhere, returning to Insights reflects the updated underlying weekly data.

steps.description: Open the app
Open Insights
Navigate to a different app section
Make a small change to weekly data via the UI (for example, create a simple entry that affects weekly totals)
Return to Insights
Verify the charts or weekly totals reflect the change

title: Insights remains consistent after navigating away and returning
description: Verifies the selected week/date range and resulting charts remain consistent when the user leaves Insights and comes back.

steps.description: Open the app
Open Insights
Select a different week or date range for review
Navigate to a different app section
Return to Insights
Verify the charts and summaries still reflect the previously selected period

title: Prevent starting a second timer while one is active
description: This test verifies the app blocks creating a second active timer and shows an in-app prompt to stop or replace the current timer.

steps.description: Navigate to the app start view
Start a timer for a current task
Attempt to start a second timer while the first is still active
Verify an in-app prompt is displayed to stop or replace the existing active timer
Verify only one timer session remains active

title: Prevent saving a habit with an invalid weekly target
description: Verifies the app blocks saving a habit when the weekly target is zero or non-numeric and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to the app home screen
Click to open Habits
Start adding a new habit
Fill "Read" into the habit name field
Fill "0" into the weekly target field
Save the habit
Verify a weekly target validation error is visible
Verify the habit is not added to the habits list

title: Enforce category limit of five active tasks in Weekly Agenda
description: This test verifies a user cannot add a sixth active task into the same Weekly Agenda category and sees a validation message preventing it.

steps.description: Navigate to the app start view
Click the navigation item to open the Weekly Agenda view
Add a new task into a single category in the Weekly Agenda
Fill "Agenda task 1" into the task title field
Save the task
Add a new task into the same category in the Weekly Agenda
Fill "Agenda task 2" into the task title field
Save the task
Add a new task into the same category in the Weekly Agenda
Fill "Agenda task 3" into the task title field
Save the task
Add a new task into the same category in the Weekly Agenda
Fill "Agenda task 4" into the task title field
Save the task
Add a new task into the same category in the Weekly Agenda
Fill "Agenda task 5" into the task title field
Save the task
Attempt to add a sixth active task into the same category
Verify a validation message is displayed preventing more than five active tasks in that category
Verify the sixth task is not added to the category list

title: Prevent saving a category without a name
description: Verifies creating a category without a name is blocked and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to the app home screen
Click to open Categories management
Start creating a new category
Leave the category name field empty
Select a color for the category
Save the category
Verify a category name validation error is visible
Verify the category is not added to the category list

title: Insights handles an empty week with a clear empty state
description: Verifies Insights can render for a week with no tracked data and shows an appropriate empty state rather than broken charts.

steps.description: Open the app
Open Insights
Select a week/date range that appears to have no tracked entries
Verify an empty state is visible or charts show no data without UI breakage
